title: mimulus luteus var. cupreus
intro: Mimulus luteus var. cupreus, also known as monkey flower or yellow monkey flower, is a variant of the Mimulus luteus species, characterized by its yellow or copper-colored flowers. Traditionally, Mimulus luteus var. cupreus has been used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The medicinal properties of this plant are attributed to its ability to soothe and calm the body, promoting relaxation and reducing stress, which in turn can lead to various health benefits such as improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety, and boosted immune system. Mimulus luteus var. cupreus can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
